mapper.select:
SELECT cr.room_id as roomId,
b.company_name as partnerName,
c.nickname as partnerName,
IFNULL( CASE WHEN m.message_type = 'IMAGE' THEN '(사진)' ELSE m.content END, '대화 내용이 없습니다.' ) as lastMessage, CASE WHEN m.send_at IS NULL THEN '' WHEN YEAR(m.send_at) < YEAR(CURDATE()) THEN DATE_FORMAT(m.send_at, '%Y-%m-%d') WHEN DATE(m.send_at) = CURDATE() THEN DATE_FORMAT(m.send_at, '%H:%i') WHEN DATE(m.send_at) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) THEN '어제' ELSE DATE_FORMAT(m.send_at, '%m-%d') END as lastMessageTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm WHERE cm.room_id = cr.room_id AND cm.sender_type != #{userType} AND cm.is_read = 0) as unreadCount
FROM chat_room cr
JOIN business b ON cr.business_id = b.business_id
JOIN customer c ON cr.customer_id = c.customer_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t1.room_id, t1.message_type, t1.content, t1.send_at FROM chat_message t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT room_id, MAX(message_id) as max_id FROM chat_message GROUP BY room_id ) t2 ON t1.message_id = t2.max_id ) m ON cr.room_id = m.room_id
WHERE
cr.customer_id = #{myId}
cr.business_id = #{myId}
ORDER BY IFNULL(m.send_at, cr.created_at) DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT message_id as messageId, room_id as roomId, sender_id as senderId, sender_type as senderType, message_type as messageType, content, DATE_FORMAT(send_at, '%H:%i') as sendAt FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY message_id DESC LIMIT 20 ) sub ORDER BY messageId ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message cm JOIN chat_room cr ON cm.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cm.is_read = 0
AND cr.customer_id = #{myId} AND cm.sender_type != 'CUSTOMER'
AND cr.business_id = #{myId} AND cm.sender_type != 'BUSINESS'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (room_id, sender_id, sender_type, message_type, content, send_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{senderType}, #{messageType}, #{content}, NOW())
